title: The Boat Ride
content: Sophia joined a boat tour to explore several small islands near the coast. The water was calm, and the weather was perfect for sailing. During the trip, she admired rocky cliffs, hidden beaches, and clear blue water. The guide explained interesting facts about the area while passengers relaxed on deck. At one island, everyone had time to swim and take photographs. Sophia loved feeling the sea breeze and watching the coastline from the water. The boat ride became one of the highlights of her vacation.
